channel.title: Obsidian Lake // US Breach + Surveillance Feed
channel.description: Curated rolling feed of significant US data breaches and dragnet-surveillance disclosures. Aggregated from public disclosures, regulatory filings, civil-liberties journalism, and the cypherpunk press. Calm signal, not vendor FUD.
channel.generator: Obsidian Lake Breach + Surveillance Aggregator v1.2

item.title: [BREACH · INFO] Florida County Database Mistake: Election Officials’ Logins Among Exposed Data | UpGuard
item.description:
UpGuard can now disclose that an Amazon S3 storage bucket containing publicly exposed backups of systems representing the intranet and web presence for Martin County, Florida has been secured.
// Category: breach // Severity: info // Sector: gov // Actor: Unattributed // Vector: Under investigation // Records (est.): 3 // $ (est.): $0 // Source: upguard // Original: https://www.upguard.com/breaches/martin-county-florida-election-officials-passwords

item.title: [BREACH · CRITICAL] Home Economics: How Life in 123 Million American Households Was Exposed Online | UpGuard
item.description:
This cloud leak reveals the personal details of 123 million US households, revealing in-depth analysis of their finances sold by credit reporting agency Experian.
// Category: breach // Severity: critical // Sector: tech // Actor: Unattributed // Vector: Under investigation // Records (est.): 123,000,000 // $ (est.): $0 // Source: upguard // Original: https://www.upguard.com/breaches/cloud-leak-alteryx

item.title: [BREACH · CRITICAL] The RNC Files: Inside the Largest US Voter Data Leak | UpGuard
item.description:
UpGuard has discovered an open database containing information on what appear to be approximately 198 million American voters left misconfigured by a GOP analytics firm.
// Category: breach // Severity: critical // Sector: other // Actor: Unattributed // Vector: Misconfiguration // Records (est.): 198,000,000 // $ (est.): $0 // Source: upguard // Original: https://www.upguard.com/breaches/the-rnc-files

item.title: [BREACH · INFO] Out of Commission: How the Oklahoma Department of Securities Leaked Millions of Files | UpGuard
item.description:
A storage server configured for public access exposed millions of files belonging to the Oklahoma Securities Commission.
// Category: breach // Severity: info // Sector: finance // Actor: Unattributed // Vector: Under investigation // Records (est.): 0 // $ (est.): $0 // Source: upguard // Original: https://www.upguard.com/breaches/rsync-oklahoma-securities-commission

item.title: [BREACH · INFO] Double Indemnity: How An Insurer Exposed Its Customers | UpGuard
item.description:
A shared-risk property insurance provider in Maryland left exposed data revealing the personal details of thousands of customers.
// Category: breach // Severity: info // Sector: finance // Actor: Unattributed // Vector: Under investigation // Records (est.): 0 // $ (est.): $0 // Source: upguard // Original: https://www.upguard.com/breaches/nas-leak-mdjia

item.title: [BREACH · INFO] Spy Games: How Booz Allen Hamilton Exposed Pentagon Access Keys | UpGuard
item.description:
While this blog post provides a description of a data exposure discovery involving Booz Allen Hamilton and the US National Geospatial-Intelligence Agency (NGA), this is no longer an active data breach.
// Category: breach // Severity: info // Sector: other // Actor: Unattributed // Vector: Under investigation // Records (est.): 0 // $ (est.): $0 // Source: upguard // Original: https://www.upguard.com/breaches/spy-games-booz-allen-hamilton-pentagon

item.title: [BREACH · INFO] Out of Pocket: How an ISP Exposed Administrative System Credentials | UpGuard
item.description:
ISPs do more than provide internet service for individual customers-- they can also act as part of US critical infrastructure. See how one ISP exposed their administrative and root passwords to the public.
// Category: breach // Severity: info // Sector: telecom // Actor: Unattributed // Vector: Under investigation // Records (est.): 0 // $ (est.): $0 // Source: upguard // Original: https://www.upguard.com/breaches/out-of-pocket-how-an-isp-exposed-administrative-system-credentials

item.title: [BREACH · INFO] Police Procedural: How South Carolina Arrest Records Were Exposed | UpGuard
item.description:
Everyone who depends on tech assumes its risks. The justice system is no exception. See how detailed arrest records for South Carolina were exposed online.
// Category: breach // Severity: info // Sector: other // Actor: Unattributed // Vector: Under investigation // Records (est.): 0 // $ (est.): $0 // Source: upguard // Original: https://www.upguard.com/breaches/spartan-south-carolina-arrest-records-data-exposure

item.title: [BREACH · INFO] The Aggregate IQ Files, Part One: How a Political Engineering Firm Exposed Their Code Base | UpGuard
item.description:
Political data firm AggregateIQ exposed IT assets that raise questions for society about how technology is being used in recent US political history.
// Category: breach // Severity: info // Sector: other // Actor: Unattributed // Vector: Under investigation // Records (est.): 0 // $ (est.): $0 // Source: upguard // Original: https://www.upguard.com/breaches/aggregate-iq-part-one

item.title: [BREACH · CRITICAL] Black Box, Red Disk: How Top Secret NSA and Army Data Leaked Online | UpGuard
item.description:
A sensitive S3 bucket left wide open, containing highly classified 'NOFORN' data, was discovered by the UpGuard team.
// Category: breach // Severity: critical // Sector: other // Actor: Unattributed // Vector: Under investigation // Records (est.): 3,000,000,000 // $ (est.): $0 // Source: upguard // Original: https://www.upguard.com/breaches/cloud-leak-inscom

item.title: [BREACH · INFO] Social Insecurity: Billions of Social Security Number and Passwords | UpGuard
item.description:
UpGuard research found a trove of sensitive information in an exposed Elastic database. Getting to the bottom of what it meant led us down an interesting path.
// Category: breach // Severity: info // Sector: other // Actor: Unattributed // Vector: Under investigation // Records (est.): 0 // $ (est.): $0 // Source: upguard // Original: https://www.upguard.com/breaches/social-insecurity-billions-of-social-security-number-and-passwords

item.title: [BREACH · INFO] Okanogan Behavioral Healthcare Settles Class Action Data Breach Lawsuit
item.description:
Okanogan Behavioral Healthcare, a provider of holistic behavioral health services in Okanogan County, Washington, has agreed to settle a class […]

The post Okanogan Behavioral Healthcare Settles Class Action Data Breach Lawsuit appeared first on The HIPAA Journal.

// Category: breach // Severity: info // Sector: healthcare // Actor: Unattributed // Vector: Under investigation // Records (est.): 8,230 // $ (est.): $0 // Source: hipaajournal // Original: https://www.hipaajournal.com/okanogan-behavioral-healthcare-settles-data-breach-settlement/

item.title: [BREACH · INFO] South Florida Injury Centers; Chickasaw Nation Department of Health Report Data Breaches
item.description:
A hacking incident has been reported by South Florida Injury Centers, and Chickasaw Nation Department of Health has discovered that […]

The post South Florida Injury Centers; Chickasaw Nation Department of Health Report Data Breaches appeared first on The HIPAA Journal.

// Category: breach // Severity: info // Sector: healthcare // Actor: Unattributed // Vector: Under investigation // Records (est.): 8,230 // $ (est.): $0 // Source: hipaajournal // Original: https://www.hipaajournal.com/south-florida-injury-centers-chackasaw-bation-doh-data-breach/

item.title: [BREACH · CRITICAL] MOVEit Breach Defendants Lose 2nd Bid to Toss Negligence Claims
[BREACH · INFO] Washington Dept. Health & Social Services Insider Breach Affects 8,600 Individuals
item.description:
The Washington Department of Social and Health Services (DSHS) has identified an insider data breach involving unauthorized access to the protected […]

The post Washington Dept. Health & Social Services Insider Breach Affects 8,600 Individuals appeared first on The HIPAA Journal.

// Category: breach // Severity: info // Sector: healthcare // Actor: Unattributed // Vector: Insider // Records (est.): 8,600 // $ (est.): $0 // Source: hipaajournal // Original: https://www.hipaajournal.com/washington-dept-health-social-services-insider-breach-2026/

item.title: [BREACH · CRITICAL] Data Breaches Reported by Amicus Solutions: Huntsville Hospital Health System
item.description:
Amicus Solutions (Fedora Solutions) has been affected by a cybersecurity incident, and Huntsville Hospital has confirmed it was affected by […]

The post Data Breaches Reported by Amicus Solutions: Huntsville Hospital Health System appeared first on The HIPAA Journal.

// Category: breach // Severity: critical // Sector: healthcare // Actor: Unattributed // Vector: Under investigation // Records (est.): 8,230 // $ (est.): $0 // Source: hipaajournal // Original: https://www.hipaajournal.com/data-breaches-amicus-solutions-huntsville-hospital-health-system/
